description:
Announcement of great news for all job worker people can be done soon by the Central Government; Airports Authority of India has taken the decision to allow GoAir to operate on 'Cash and Carry' Basis; The time limit for completion of the dry dock project at Cochin Shipyard Limited has been revised to December 2022; Integrated net profit of Power Grid Corporation of India, the power transmission company of Public Sector, declined 18% to Rs 2,048.42 crore in the first quarter of the current financial year 2020-21; Bank of Baroda has incurred a loss of Rs 864 crore in the End Quarter on 30 June of the current financial year; Rakesh Jhunjhunwala got a shock as soon as Share Market opened on Tuesday morning; Bharti AXA General Insurance Company Limited can be merged with ICICI Lombard; People waiting to travel to West Bengal from cities like Delhi, Mumbai and Ahmedabad may have to wait for a long time; Telecom company Vodafone idea has misreported the news of selling a stake to Life Insurance Corporation of India i.e. LIC; Today, on August 11, was the last chance to invest in the rights issue of Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services.
